startPoint.en: Go to the Goblin Village and talk to General Bentnoze or General Wartface.
startPoint.es: Ve a Goblin Village y habla con General Bentnoze o General Wartface.

items.name: Goblin mail
items.display: 3 suits of goblin mail (can be obtained during quest)

items.name: Blue dye
items.display: Blue dye (or 2 woad leaves and 5 coins to obtain from Aggie or Rana the dyer)

items.name: Red dye
items.display: Red dye (or 3 redberries and 5 coins to obtain from Aggie or Rana the dyer)

items.name: Yellow dye
items.display: Yellow dye (or 2 onions and 5 coins to obtain from Aggie or Rana the dyer)

recommended.name: Archaeology teleport
recommended.display: Archaeology teleport to teleport to General Bentnoze and General Wartface

text.en: Teleport to Falador and run north along the road to the Goblin Village.
text.es: Teletranspórtate a Falador y corre hacia el norte por el camino hasta Goblin Village.

text.en: Talk to General Bentnoze or General Wartface, both of whom are located in the hut.
text.es: Habla con General Bentnoze o General Wartface, ambos se encuentran en la choza.

chatOptions: 1 So how is life for the goblins?
2 Do you want me to pick an armour colour for you?

text.en: If you need goblin mail, you can grab three suits of goblin mail from the following crates:
text.es: Si necesitas cota de malla goblin, puedes coger tres trajes de cota de malla goblin de los siguientes cajones:
Detrás de la choza de los generales.

text.en: Up a ladder in the middle of the gate entrance of the camp.
text.es: Subiendo una escalera en medio de la entrada de la puerta del campamento.

text.en: Orange dye (Combine Red dye and Yellow dye), Blue dye, 3 suits of goblin mail
Dye one goblin mail blue and another orange.
text.es: Tiñe una cota de malla goblin de azul y otra de naranja.

text.en: Use the orange goblin mail on one of the generals.
text.es: Usa la cota de malla goblin naranja en uno de los generales.

text.en: After the cutscene, use the blue goblin mail on one of them.
text.es: Después de la escena, usa la cota de malla goblin azul en uno de ellos.

text.en: Use a normal goblin mail on one of them.
text.es: Usa una cota de malla goblin normal en uno de ellos.
